overview: High-end industrial e-commerce web app for Kentainers — a Kenyan water tank and storage solutions company. Features a full product catalog with 12 SKUs, real-time search, capacity calculator, and WhatsApp-powered checkout.
features: 12-product catalog with pricing, savings badges, and styled SVG images
Real-time search filtering by product name and capacity
Shopping cart with localStorage persistence across page refreshes
Capacity calculator tool for household tank recommendations
WhatsApp checkout workflow with formatted order message
Mobile-first design with bottom nav bar and sticky glassmorphism header
Industrial premium design: Navy, Safety Orange, Montserrat + Roboto typography
